description: Style NoteFresh off skechers Shape-Ups Radius Trainer collection, the Evolution shoe is the right workout shoe for heavy duty shaping up at the gym. The shoe's construction aims to increase lower-leg muscle activation, increase calorie burn, improve posture and reduce back pain upon its use. Cushioned to reduce fatigue, this is the right training shoe you've been searching for that understands your body's attempts to shape up. Comes with a workout DVD and an instruction booklet. Product DetailsSmooth synthetic and mesh upper for good support and cushioningAdvanced Stabilization insole with a rigid heel to stabilize the foot and prevent incorrect flexingDual firm and soft-density midsole to induce a natural rocking effect that takes the pressure off the joints and backPatented roll bridge technology for increased side-to-side stability and controlling forward movementKinetic Wedge polyurethane midsole to give every stride a gradual transitionTPU outsole with herringbone lugsMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshRemove dirt with a clean cloth
